items.title: Newcastle v Aston Villa, Crystal Palace v Chelsea and more: football clockwatch – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from Sunday’s 2pm Premier League matches ⚽ Jonathan Wilson: is Carrick more than the new Solskjær? ⚽ Scores | Tables | Mail Daniel with any thoughts Oh, but here’s Rosenior, explaining that Cole Palmer isn’t fit to play today, but has a chance of making Wednesday’s trip to Naples. He notes that the league is close and physical, but he has good players and is excited to see where the project goes – the club “demands winning in this moment”. There aren’t many days on the training pitch, but he hopes the work they’re doing with the team and with individuals are working. Continue reading...

items.title: London City 1-2 Manchester City, Aston Villa 1-4 Manchester United, and more: WSL clockwatch – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from Sunday’s four WSL fixtures ⚽ Scores | Tables | Mead sparks Arsenal win | Mail John London City 0-0 Manchester City Asllani has a shot on goal, the first effort of the game. London City have started well. Continue reading...

items.title: Verbijsterde Correia: 'Eén, twee, drie… nee, honderd procent penalty'
items.summary: Telstar-trainer Anthony Correia vertelde na de nipte nederlaag van zijn ploeg tegen AZ een bekend verhaal: dat van gemiste kansen van zijn ploeg. Voorts was de coach verbijsterd over een niet gegeven strafschop voor een trekfout van Jeroen Zoet.

items.title: Sources: Fulham bid $38m for USMNT's Pepi
items.summary: Fulham have made a bid of €32 million ($38m) for the services of PSV forward Ricardo Pepi, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: 'Astonishing save!' | Martinez denies 'wonder' Tonali effort after just 35-seconds!
items.summary: Emi Martinez denies 'wonder' Sandro Tonali effort after just 35-seconds for Aston Villa against Newcastle in the Premier League.

items.title: Echteld wint voor het eerst: 'Complimenten voor de strijd, spel moet beter'
items.summary: De eerste AZ-week onder leiding van Leeroy Echteld was voetbaltechnisch niet overtuigend, maar eindigt toch nog met een goed gevoel. Na een teleurstellende remise tegen FC Volendam, werd de tweede Noord-Hollandse clash van de week wél gewonnen. Echteld reageerde na de nipte zege in Velsen-Zuid.

items.title: VI Live: Fortuna kantelt de wedstrijd en maakt via Duijvestijn 1-2
items.summary: Zondag wordt er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. AZ gaat om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Telstar, FC Groningen speelt tegen Fortuna Sittard, FC Utrecht ontvangt Sparta Rotterdam en ook in het buitenland staat ons veel moois te wachten. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: Alpine confirm Horner consortium in talks to buy stake in team
items.summary: Christian Horner is in talks about an F1 comeback, with the former Red Bull team principal's consortium interested in buying a minority stake in Alpine.

items.title: AZ overtuigt niet maar boekt in provincieclash wel eerste zege onder Echteld
items.summary: De Noord-Hollandse derby tussen Telstar en AZ werd zondag een prooi voor de bezoekers. AZ overtuigde niet, maar had zo'n kwartier voor tijd aan één bevlieging genoeg voor het volle pond in het BUKO Stadion.

items.title: Live updates: Chelsea travel to Crystal Palace in Premier League
items.summary: Follow live as Chelsea face Crystal Palace in the Premier League, with Barcelona vs. Oviedo and Arsenal vs. Man United still to come.

items.title: Van Dijk: No problem with Liverpool 'togetherness'
items.summary: Virgil van Dijk believes Liverpool lack consistency but not togetherness after the club's hopes of Champions League qualification were dealt a blow.

items.title: Rodman marks 'fresh start' in scoring U.S. return
items.summary: USWNT coach Emma Hayes heralded a "fresh start" for Trinity Rodman after the forward scored in just her second match since the 2024 Olympics in a 6-0 rout of Paraguay.

items.title: 'Best in the world' Mbappé and Vini put Madrid top
items.summary: Coach Alvaro Arbeloa praised Kylian Mbappé and Vinícius Júnior as "the best players in the world" after the pair inspired Real Madrid to a 2-0 win at Villarreal.

items.title: Guardiola fileert debuterende scheidsrechter: 'Nu zal iedereen hem kennen'
items.summary: Pep Guardiola was niet bepaald te spreken over het Premier League-debuut van scheidsrechter Farai Hallam. De 32-jarige scheidsrechter maakte direct naam door het advies van VAR Darren England in de wind te slaan, tot afgrijzen van Manchester City-manager Guardiola.

items.title: Leicester City on brink of sacking Martí Cifuentes after poor run goes on
items.summary: Manager is under fierce pressure after defeat by Oxford Leicester hoped to be promotion candidates but are 14th Leicester City are on the brink of sacking Martí Cifuentes after dropping to 14th in the Championship. Leicester are to hold crunch boardroom talks on Sunday to determine the manager’s future. Leicester slumped to a humiliating home defeat against struggling Oxford United on Saturday and have won one of their past five matches. Continue reading...

items.title: Reed beats LIV Golf rival to Dubai title as McIlroy fails to contend
items.summary: Patrick Reed held off LIV Golf League rival David Puig to claim a maiden Rolex Series title with a four-stroke victory at the DP World Tour’s Hero Dubai Desert Classic in Dubai.

items.title: STUNNER! Buendia strike puts Aston Villa in front at Newcastle LIVE!
Fulham make £28m bid to sign PSV forward Pepi
items.summary: Fulham make a £28m bid to sign United States forward Ricardo Pepi from Dutch club PSV Eindhoven.

items.title: Van Dijk wants 'very important' Robertson to stay
items.summary: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk says he wants Andy Robertson, who is a target for Tottenham, to stay at the club as he remains a "very important" member of the squad.

items.title: Why Carrick's Man Utd coaches are more than just 'a bunch of his mates'
items.summary: In his BBC Sport column, ex-Premier League boss Tony Pulis explains the thinking behind Michael Carrick's backroom staff appointments at Manchester United, and what a manager wants from those roles.
